markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review a new strategic framework for CheckThat and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategic Framework:** CheckThat is now a brand research tool measuring AI perception. It will use four composite scores (Presence, Reputation, Perception, Influence) to create actionable benchmarks, like a "Gartner Magic Quadrant" for AI.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**Technical Pivot:** The current analytics system is too rigid. A database migration is required to support the new flexible data model. This will be a heads-down engineering task for a few days.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [**Immediate Priority:** Enriching the "Context Layer" by building a comprehensive "Buying Graph" of market categories and vendors. This is foundational for all other work and provides SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
  - [**Product Strategy:** The focus shifts from complex dashboards to "snapshots"—AI-generated reports with charts. This de-risks the data pipeline and simplifies UI development.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)

## Topics

### Current State & User Feedback

  - [**Metrics:** Minimal user activity (1 external invite), but internal testing is underway.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [**User Feedback:** Early calls with smaller startups show strong interest, but they are unfamiliar with terms like "AOG" (AI-Generated Content).](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Engineering Bandwidth:** Limited to two engineers this week (Pedro is out). A database migration will consume their full attention for several days.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### New Strategic Framework: AI Brand Research

  - [**Core Analogy:** CheckThat is like traditional brand research (e.g., Super Bowl ad surveys), but it surveys AI models (ChatGPT, Perplexity) instead of humans.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Goal:** Measure a brand's presence, reputation, and perception within AI-driven buying decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**Four Measurement Vectors:**](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [**Presence:** A composite score for AI visibility during evaluation.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
          - [**Metrics:** Visibility rate, position, stability, cross-engine coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**Reputation:** A composite score from deep research on analyst and peer review sites.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
          - [**Metrics:** Trust, reliability, innovation, value for money, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
      - [**Perception:** A structured qualitative score of AI's narrative on a brand.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
          - [**Method:** Uses 6 key attributes derived from analyzing 50+ analyst reports (Gartner, Forrester) to create a radar chart.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
      - [**Influence:** How internal and external actions affect the other three vectors.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [**Benchmark:** A visual chart (like a Gartner Magic Quadrant) plotting Presence vs. Perception, with bubble size representing Reputation.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)

### Technical & Product Implications

  - [**Database Migration:** Required to support the new flexible data model.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current system assumes a fixed data display, but the new framework requires dynamic slicing and dicing.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
      - [**Impact:** This is a heads-down engineering task for a few days.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Product Focus Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**From:** Complex, data-intensive dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
      - [**To:** "Snapshots"—AI-generated reports with charts.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2109.0)
      - [**Rationale:** De-risks the data pipeline and simplifies UI development.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
  - [**"AO Grader" Lead Gen Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2493.0)
      - [**Concept:** A free, public report that combines deep research with existing brand data.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2559.0)
      - [**Function:** Serves as a lead magnet, with some sections requiring signup to view.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2573.0)
      - [**Status:** In early development; Marcel will have a more concrete version by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)

### Foundational Work: Context & Taxonomy

  - [**Context Layer:** Building a comprehensive "Buying Graph" is the immediate priority.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
      - [**Components:** Company, product, competitor, market, and buyer context.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**New Terminology:** "Market Category" (the industry) and "Buying Category" (the specific problem/solution).](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A complete graph is essential for accurate insights and provides SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Prompt Taxonomy:** Crucial for managing the prompt library.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Tags (e.g., `type:perception`, `frequency:weekly`) determine how, when, and with what models prompts are run, which is key for cost control.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jose:**](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
      - [Plan and execute the database migration with Jacopo.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
      - [Assess the technical impact of the product shift to "snapshots."](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2493.0)
      - [Finalize the "AO Grader" concept by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
      - [Push the new handbook docs to the repo for team context.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2817.0)
  - [**Stevie:**](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
      - [Focus on growth tickets while engineering works on the migration.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
      - [Prioritize enriching the Context Layer by building out market and buying categories.](https://fathom.video/share/8gs4J3dq61tzrs2f_xVDpvoLM9HUjLMG?tab=summary&timestamp=2170.0)
